# Updating existing scripts with agents

<!-- source: 05-github-copilot.qmd, sections "Edit mode: Creating code from text" and
     "Workflows and tips for edit mode" -->

Using edit mode to modify code you already have, and the git discipline that makes it safe to do so.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge editing an existing plot script with an agent, committing before and after.
:::
